value.0: You look about you, suspicious, but see nothing.

You look about you, suspicious, but see nothing.

When used:

4 invisible object say, "On your mark...".

3 seconds later, these same objects say, "Get set...".

Another 3 seconds, they say, "Go!", and all the gladiator doors open at once.
This shuts and locks all the arena doors.

When used:

Opens all cell doors without giving a message.
This shouts to the server that the contestants have 15 seconds to pick a cell to enter before the doors are shut.
